name: outjack

metadata.name: outjack
metadata.summary: JACK and PortAudio integration for Python

documentation: # outjack JACK and PortAudio integration for Python ## Install These are generic installation instructions. ### To use, permanently The quickest way to get started is to install the current release from PyPI: ``` pip3 install --user outjack ``` ### To use, temporarily If you prefer to keep .local clean, install to a virtualenv: ``` python3 -m venv venvname venvname/bin/pip install -U pip venvname/bin/pip install outjack . venvname/bin/activate ``` ## Commands ### ojplay Usage example. ## API ### outjack.jackclient ### outjack.portaudioclient
